node.statement: BACKGROUND: The coherent information I_c(Λ) = S(ρ_B) - S(ρ_{RB}) for a random encoding channel Λ mapping k=rN logical qudits to N physical qudits can be computed via annealed 2nd-Rényi: I_c = -log_d E_U[Tr(ρ_B^2)] + log_d E_U[Tr(ρ_{RB}^2)]. Using Weingarten calculus, the Haar-averaged replicated circuit maps to permutation operators σ ∈ S_2 with noisy overlap matrix G̃(d,N). [Ground truth: Eqs.(1-5), main.tex lines 133-159]
